message:

@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "helm-3208-helm-upgrade-install-no-longer-works",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "helm: helm upgrade --install no longer works",
+    "description": "helm upgrade --install no longer works. This issue affects 57+ users.",
+    "type": "upgrade",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify helm upgrade symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your helm installation:\n```bash\nhelm version --short\nhelm repo list\n```\nLook for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review helm configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant helm configuration:\nAs of helm v2.7.1, after updating tiller, running helm upgrade --install flag no longer works. The following error is displayed: Error: UPGRADE FAILED: \"${RELEASE}\" has no deployed releases. Downgrading to v2.7.0 or v2.6.2 does not produce the error."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for helm upgrade --install no longer works",
+        "description": "`helm list` should only list latest release\n```yaml\n$>helm ls -a|grep ingress\nnginx-ingress            \t9       \tThu Nov 30 11:33:06 2017\tFAILED  \tnginx-ingress-0.8.2        \tkube-ingress\nnginx-ingress            \t11      \tThu Nov 30 11:37:58 2017\tFAILED  \tnginx-ingress-0.8.2        \tkube-ingress\nnginx-ingress            \t12      \tThu Nov 30 11:38:50 2017\tFAILED  \tnginx-ingress-0.8.2        \tkube-ingress\nnginx-ingress            \t8       \tThu Nov 30 11:31:27 2017\tFAILED  \tnginx-ingress-0.8.2        \tkube-ingress\nnginx-ingress            \t10      \tThu Nov 30 11:33:53 2017\tFAILED  \tnginx-ingress-0.8.2        \tkube-ingress\n$>helm diff nginx-ingres\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm helm upgrade --install no longer works is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest helm to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "See the fix PR for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/helm/helm/pull/3335",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "$>helm ls -a|grep ingress\nnginx-ingress            \t9       \tThu Nov 30 11:33:06 2017\tFAILED  \tnginx-ingress-0.8.2        \tkube-ingress\nnginx-ingress            \t11      \tThu Nov 30 11:37:58 2017\tFAILED  \tnginx-ingress-0.8.2        \tkube-ingress\nnginx-ingress            \t12      \tThu Nov 30 11:38:50 2017\tFAILED  \tnginx-ingress-0.8.2        \tkube-ingress\nnginx-ingress            \t8       \tThu Nov 30 11:31:27 2017\tFAILED  \tnginx-ingress-0.8.2        \tkube-ingress\nnginx-ingress            \t10      \tThu Nov 30 11:33:53 2017\tFAILED  \tnginx-ingress-0.8.2        \tkube-ingress\n$>helm diff nginx-ingress ./nginx-ingress\nError: \"nginx-ingress\" has no deployed releases",
+        "$ helm ls\nNAME                      REVISION    UPDATED                     STATUS      CHART                           NAMESPACE\n.....\nfront-prod                180         Tue Dec  5 17:28:22 2017    DEPLOYED    front-1                         prod\nfront-prod                90          Wed Sep 13 14:36:06 2017    DEPLOYED    front-1                         prod \n...",
+        "helm upgrade --install --wait --timeout 300 -f ./helm/env/staging.yaml --set image.tag=xxx --namespace=content content ./helm/content\nError: UPGRADE FAILED: no resource with the name \"content-content\" found\nhelm list | grep content\ncontent                        \t60      \tMon Dec 25 06:02:38 2017\tDEPLOYED\tcontent-0.1.0                \tcontent           \ncontent                        \t12      \tTue Oct 10 00:02:24 2017\tDEPLOYED\tcontent-0.1.0                \tcontent           \ncontent                        \t37      \tTue Dec 12 00:42:42 2017\tDEPLOYED\tcontent-0.1.0                \tcontent           \ncontent                        \t4       \tSun Oct  8 05:58:44 2017\tDEPLOYED\tk8s-0.1.0                    \tcontent           \ncontent                        \t1       \tSat Oct  7 22:29:24 2017\tDEPLOY"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
